messages.content: You are an expert in MOF material design.
Design a MOF material for adsorbing CarbonDioxide. The material should exhibit good adsorption performance under medium-high pressure and room temperature conditions.
You are an expert in MOF material design.
Design a MOF material for adsorbing Methane. The material should exhibit moderate adsorption performance under low pressure and room temperature conditions.
You are an expert in MOF material design.
Design a MOF material for adsorbing Methane. The material should exhibit moderate adsorption performance under medium-low pressure and room temperature conditions.
You are an expert in MOF material design.
Design a MOF material for adsorbing Nitrogen. The material should exhibit poor adsorption performance under low pressure and room temperature conditions.
